ds_73b4162ac1b9.requirement: reduce hallucination rate and improve cost efficiency

decisions.title: Implement Prompt Length Guardrails to Reduce Hallucination and Control Costs
decisions.narrative: Strong correlation (-0.51) exists between hallucination flag and successful response, while prompt length drives 86% of token consumption predictability. Establishing optimal prompt length thresholds can simultaneously reduce hallucination rates and improve cost efficiency by guiding users toward effective prompt structures that minimize both errors and unnecessary token usage.
actionSteps: Set optimal prompt length thresholds based on hallucination and cost data correlation analysis
Design UI/UX prompt guidance features to steer users toward cost-effective structures
Conduct A/B testing on prompt optimization features within 30 days

decisions.title: Deploy Token Budget Controls with Quality Monitoring
decisions.narrative: The +0.66 correlation between total tokens and estimated cost enables predictable cost scaling, while latency shows -0.49 correlation with successful response. Implementing token budgets with tiered routing (simple queries to lower-cost models) can achieve 15-20% token reduction while monitoring quality metrics to prevent increased hallucination rates.
actionSteps: Establish maximum token thresholds for different use cases based on value and quality requirements
Implement tiered model routing directing simple queries to lower-cost models
Monitor cost-per-outcome and hallucination rates to ensure quality maintenance

decisions.title: Investigate Cost Anomaly Before Scaling Optimization Initiatives
decisions.narrative: Unusual values detected in estimated USD costs require immediate investigation to prevent budget overruns and ensure accurate baseline metrics. Resolving this anomaly is essential before implementing token optimization and pricing strategies, as flawed cost data could undermine both hallucination reduction efforts and cost efficiency improvements.
actionSteps: Audit estimatedcostusd field to identify root cause of flagged anomalies within 7 days
Validate data integrity for all cost-related metrics before proceeding with strategic initiatives
Establish monitoring framework to detect future cost anomalies in real-time

decisions.title: Deploy Predictive Token Forecasting for Proactive Resource Management
decisions.narrative: Gradient Boosted Trees model with 22.32% MAPE enables proactive capacity planning and resource allocation to prevent latency issues that correlate with poor response quality (-0.49). Real-time forecasting can optimize infrastructure to reduce both operational costs and quality degradation that leads to hallucinations.
actionSteps: Fast-track production integration of validated forecasting model within 2 weeks
Establish real-time dashboards with automated alerting when MAPE exceeds 25% threshold
Link forecast accuracy to capacity planning decisions that reduce latency and improve response quality

ds_73b4162ac1b9.requirement: reduce hallucination rate and improve cost efficiency

decisions.title: Implement Prompt Optimization to Reduce Hallucinations and Token Waste
decisions.narrative: Strong correlation (-0.51) between hallucination flag and successful response indicates hallucinations directly impact success rates. By leveraging the prompt length/total tokens relationship (+0.86 correlation) to establish prompt length guardrails and optimization tools, we can reduce both hallucination rates and the associated token waste, addressing both stated goals simultaneously.
actionSteps: Establish optimal prompt length thresholds within 30 days to minimize hallucination triggers
Deploy prompt optimization UI/UX guidance showing cost reduction opportunities of 15-25%
Conduct A/B testing on prompt length optimization features to validate hallucination reduction

decisions.title: Deploy Token-Based Cost Control and Tiered Routing System
decisions.narrative: The +0.66 correlation between total tokens and estimated cost enables predictable cost optimization. Implementing token budgets and tiered routing (simple queries to lower-cost models, complex to premium) can reduce cost-per-outcome by 20% while maintaining quality, directly improving cost efficiency as stated in the goal.
actionSteps: Set maximum token thresholds for different use cases based on value delivered
Implement tiered model routing to direct queries appropriately by complexity
Monitor cost per value unit and track against business outcomes monthly

decisions.title: Investigate Cost Anomaly and Deploy Token Forecasting Model
decisions.narrative: Unusual values detected in estimated USD costs require immediate investigation to prevent budget overruns. Simultaneously deploy the validated Gradient Boosted Trees forecasting model (22.32% MAPE) to enable proactive resource allocation and cost prediction, supporting the cost efficiency goal.
actionSteps: Investigate root cause of cost anomaly in estimatedcostusd field within 7 days
Fast-track production integration of forecasting model with real-time dashboards
Implement automated alerting when forecast MAPE exceeds 25% threshold

decisions.title: Reduce Latency to Improve Success Rates and User Satisfaction
decisions.narrative: Latency shows negative correlation with both successful response (-0.49) and user satisfaction (-0.37), indicating performance impacts quality outcomes. Since latency correlates with prompt length (+0.33) and tokens (+0.26), optimizing prompt efficiency will simultaneously reduce hallucinations, improve success rates, and enhance satisfaction.
actionSteps: Pre-allocate compute resources based on prompt length predictions to reduce latency 15-20%
Optimize prompt structures to reduce unnecessary tokens and associated processing time
Track latency metrics against successful response and satisfaction scores weekly

ds_73b4162ac1b9.requirement: increase estimated cost efficiency by reducing hallucination rate

decisions.title: Reduce Hallucination Rate to Improve Cost Efficiency
decisions.narrative: Hallucination flag shows a strong negative correlation (-0.51) with successful responses, directly impacting cost efficiency as failed responses waste token consumption. While the analytics context doesn't provide specific hallucination rate metrics or direct cost impact calculations, addressing this correlation can reduce wasted processing costs and improve value extraction from the $215K token usage opportunity.
actionSteps: Analyze hallucination patterns across prompt lengths and token volumes to identify triggers
Implement prompt engineering guidelines that reduce hallucination likelihood while maintaining efficiency
Monitor hallucination rate against cost-per-successful-response metric to track efficiency gains

decisions.title: Optimize Prompt Length to Reduce Hallucinations and Costs
decisions.narrative: The strong correlation (+0.86) between prompt length and total tokens, combined with the hallucination-success relationship, suggests that optimizing prompt structure can simultaneously reduce hallucination rates and token costs. Implementing prompt length guardrails and compression techniques can capture value from the $281K opportunity while improving response quality.
actionSteps: Establish optimal prompt length thresholds that minimize hallucinations and maximize token efficiency
Develop prompt compression techniques and user education programs on effective prompt writing
Conduct A/B testing on prompt optimization features within 30 days to validate impact

decisions.title: Implement Token Budget Controls for Cost-Efficient Operations
decisions.narrative: The +0.66 correlation between total tokens and estimated costs enables predictable cost management. Establishing token budgets and tiered routing can reduce cost-per-outcome by 20% while preventing hallucination-related waste, directly supporting the cost efficiency goal across the $215K opportunity.
actionSteps: Set maximum token thresholds for different use cases based on hallucination risk and value delivered
Implement tiered routing to direct queries to appropriate models balancing cost and accuracy
Track cost-per-successful-response metric to identify optimal token investment levels

decisions.title: Investigate Cost Anomaly to Ensure Accurate Efficiency Metrics

While currently valued at $0 impact, this data integrity issue could compromise hallucination rate and cost efficiency calculations, undermining the reliability of optimization efforts.
